translations.### iOS ≥ 12 在使用者的「設定」中增加「APP通知設定頁」捷徑 (S: ### iOS ≥ 12 Adds "APP Notification Settings Page" Shortcut in User's "Settings" (Swift)
translations.**p.s 個別關閉通知功能是我們APP本來就有的功能，但透過結合iOS ≥12: **p.s The option to individually disable notifications is already a feature of our app, but combining it with iOS ≥12's new notification features offers better results and improved user experience**
translations.- Implement the delegate in AppDelegate':
- Implement the delegate in AppDelegate's didFinishLaunchingWithOptions method

- AppDelegate conforms to the delegate and implements the method
translations.- [iOS ≥ 10 Notification Service Extensi:
- [iOS ≥ 10 Notification Service Extension Usage (Swift)](../cb6eba52a342/)

- [What? iOS 12 Can Send Push Notifications Without User Permission (Swift)](../ade9e745a4bf/)

- [Handling Push Notification Permission Status from iOS 9 to iOS 12 (Swift)](../fd7f92d52baa/)
translations.> **p.s The option to individually disab: > **p.s The option to individually disable notifications is already a feature of our app, but combining it with iOS ≥12's new notification features offers better results and improved user experience**
translations.Appdelegate遵守代理並實作方法\n: AppDelegate conforms to the delegate and implements the method
translations.[什麼？iOS 12 不需使用者授權就能傳送推播通知(Swift)](../ad: [What? iOS 12 Can Send Push Notifications Without User Permission (Swift)](../ade9e745a4bf/)
translations.[從 iOS 9 到 iOS 12 推播通知權限狀態處理(Swift)](../: [Handling Push Notification Permission Status from iOS 9 to iOS 12 (Swift)](../fd7f92d52baa/)
translations.iOS ≥ 12 可以在使用者的「設定」中增加您的APP通知設定頁面捷徑，讓使用: iOS ≥ 12 allows adding a shortcut to your APP's notification settings page within the user's "Settings," giving users more options when adjusting notifications; they can jump to "inside the APP" instead of directly turning off notifications from the "system side." Let's start with a picture:
translations.以 [結婚吧APP](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/a: Take the [Wedding App](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/%E7%B5%90%E5%A9%9A%E5%90%A7-%E4%B8%8D%E6%89%BE%E6%9C%80%E8%B2%B4-%E5%8F%AA%E6%89%BE%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8D/id1356057329?ls=1&mt=8){:target="_blank"} as an example. If users find the column notifications too distracting, they can turn them off individually while still receiving important system messages.
translations.另外在使用者收到通知時，若欲使用3D Touch調整設定「關閉」通知，會多一個「: Additionally, when users receive a notification and use 3D Touch to adjust settings to "Turn Off" notifications, there will be an extra option called "Settings in App" for users to choose.
translations.在Appdelegate的didFinishLaunchingWithOptio: Implement the delegate in AppDelegate's didFinishLaunchingWithOptions method
translations.在詢問過使用者要不要允許通知之後，通知若為開啟狀態下方就會出現選項囉（ **不論: After asking the user for notification permission, if notifications are enabled, the option will appear below ( **regardless of whether the user allowed or denied earlier** ).
translations.完成！相較於前幾篇文章，這個功能實作相較起來非常簡單 🏆\n\n: Done! Compared to previous articles, implementing this feature is much simpler 🏆
translations.我們繼續針對推播進行改進，不管是原有的技術或是新開放的功能，都來嘗試嘗試！\n\: Let's continue improving push notifications by experimenting with both existing technologies and newly available features!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.第二步，也是最後一步；我們要讓 **appDelegate** 遵守 **UNU: The second and final step is to make the **appDelegate** conform to the **UNUserNotificationCenterDelegate** protocol and implement the **userNotificationCenter(_ center: UNUserNotificationCenter, openSettingsFor notification: UNNotification?)** method!
translations.這個功能讓使用者欲關閉通知時能有進到APP調整通知的選擇，開發者可以針對推播項目: This feature allows users to choose to enter the app to adjust notifications when they want to turn off notifications. Developers can categorize push notification items, letting users decide which types of notifications they want to receive.
translations.這個功能跟 [前一篇](../ade9e745a4bf/) 提到的先不用使用者授: This feature is somewhat similar to the approach mentioned in the [previous article](../ade9e745a4bf/) where silent notifications with lower interference are sent to users without requiring their authorization, to test the waters first!
translations.這部分的實作非常簡單，第一步僅需在要求推播權限時多要求一個 **.provide: This part of the implementation is very simple. The first step is to request an additional **.providesAppNotificationSettings** permission when asking for push notification authorization.
translations.都是在開發者與使用者之前架起新的橋樑，以往APP太吵，我們會直接進到設定頁無情地: They all build a new bridge between developers and users. In the past, when an app was too noisy, we would go straight to the settings page and ruthlessly turn off all notifications. However, this means that developers can no longer send any notifications—good, bad, or useful—to users, who might miss important messages or exclusive offers.
translations.除了從系統關閉通知，讓使用者還有其他選擇\n\n: Besides turning off notifications from the system, users have other options.
